theme: invent shorthand live while the dictation continues
title: Live Shorthand: Coining Radio-Brevity Codes While the Dictation Keeps Coming
strategies: identity transcription: never coin any shorthand (baseline)
reactive frequency chasing: each round, coin the single phrase with the largest net token savings THIS round alone, one per round while the codebook has room

reserve-then-spend: never coin anything in round 0; from round 1 on, first spend one slot on the best phrase that has recurred across >=2 distinct rounds (real cross-round evidence, not a one-off spike), then spend any remaining slots on the best fresh local spike
same reserve-then-spend idea generalized with a trend/momentum estimate of a phrase's growing share of the stream instead of a hard 2-round recurrence bar
